Name: CS_GRAPHICS_CONFIG_PARAM_ST
Description: Determines the default graphics configuration levels.

Fields.Name: Texture Filter Quality
Fields.Description: The texture filter quality to default to.

Fields.Name: Anti-Aliasing Quality
Fields.Description: The anti-aliasing (AA) quality to default to.

Fields.Name: Screen-space Ambient Occlusion Quality
Fields.Description: The screen-space ambient occlusion (SSAO) quality to default to.

Fields.Name: Depth of Field Quality
Fields.Description: The depth of field (DOF) quality to default to.

Fields.Name: Motion Blur Quality
Fields.Description: The motion blur quality to default to.

Fields.Name: Shadow Quality
Fields.Description: The shadow quality to default to.

Fields.Name: Lighting Quality
Fields.Description: The lighting quality to default to.

Fields.Name: Particle Quality
Fields.Description: The particle effect quality to default to.

Fields.Name: Decal Quality
Fields.Description: The decal quality to default to.

Fields.Name: Reflection Quality
Fields.Description: The reflection quality to default to.

Fields.Name: Water Quality
Fields.Description: The water quality to default to.

Fields.Name: Shader Quality
Fields.Description: The shader quality to default to.

Fields.Name: Volumetric Particle Quality
Fields.Description: The volumetric particle quality to default to.

Fields.Name: Raytracing Quality
Fields.Description: The raytracing quality (RT) to default to.

Fields.Name: Global Illumination Quality
Fields.Description: The global illumination (GI) quality to default to.
